overall.description: First-person exploration through a swampy wetland at golden hour in a video game (S.T.A.L.K.E.R. 2). The player wades through calm water reflecting the sunset sky and trees, approaches a wooden dock and stilted cabin, then continues through dense reed beds and vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: open swamp water with distant tree reflections

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow open water toward the distant tree line, with sunset reflections visible on the water surface

entered.detail: calm brown water reflecting the sky and trees
submerged wooden log visible in the foreground
dense line of trees silhouetted against the sunset
golden orange reflection of the setting sun on water

segments.scene_description: The scene opens with a first-person view wading through calm swamp water at golden hour. The water reflects the warm sunset sky and distant tree line. A wooden log is visible in the foreground left as the camera moves steadily forward toward the shore.

scene_state.functional_zone: reed-filled swamp channel approaching wooden structures

events.description: game location text 'Lesser Zone' appears in lower left corner
entering dense cattail reed beds with wooden dock becoming visible

agents.ego_description: continuing through water surrounded by tall cattails and reeds, approaching a wooden dock and cabin

entered.detail: tall brown cattails and reeds growing in the water
weathered wooden dock structure extending from the shore
raised wooden cabin on stilts with a sloped roof

segments.scene_description: The player enters the 'Lesser Zone' area, moving through dense cattail reeds that line the water channel. A wooden dock and raised cabin become visible ahead, with the camera approaching these structures while navigating through the vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock leading to raised stilt cabin

events.description: exiting water onto wooden dock planks
screen fades to black indicating scene transition

agents.ego_description: walking up the weathered wooden dock toward the raised cabin on stilts

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks of the dock walkway

segments.scene_description: The player exits the water and walks along the wooden dock toward the stilted cabin. The surrounding reeds frame the path as the camera approaches the structure, before the screen fades to black.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense swamp waterway with overhanging vegetation

events.description: fade from black into new water area with dense vegetation and darker lighting

agents.ego_description: wading through narrow water channel surrounded by dense vegetation and trees on both banks

entered.detail: thick bushes and grasses lining the water's edge
dark reflections of trees in the calm water
tall trees with sparse leaves overhanging the water

segments.scene_description: After fading from black, the scene reveals a darker, more enclosed swamp area. The player wades through water surrounded by dense vegetation and trees on both banks, with the sky partially visible through the canopy. The water reflects the trees and dimmer light of this secluded area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a swampy wetland that transitions from an open, sun-drenched waterway into a secluded, shadowed thicket. It begins by wading through calm water that reflects a warm sunset sky and distant tree line, moving steadily past a floating log toward the shore. As the camera enters the Lesser Zone, the open water gives way to dense cattail reeds that frame the approach toward a wooden dock and a raised cabin. The scene then shifts as the player exits the water to walk along the dock toward the stilted structure before a brief fade to black. Finally, the view emerges into a darker, more enclosed area of the swamp, where the golden light is replaced by a dim canopy of trees reflecting in the still water.
